observations: No exact 'cognitive-basin-canonical' — closest is BonAcqui-LLC/cntm-natural-math-canonical-library (private, recently updated, explicitly for Fractalish/Natural Math/Cognitive Basin).
BonAcqui-LLC/fractalish is the declared public research home and is the strongest match for current implementation surface.
Strong alignment with project identity: Fractalish, Natural Math, Cognitive Basin, MCVA (ternary + HOLD), ExoMCP (GUARD layer), EphUX.
Many personal '*-com' entries are Cloudflare Worker site backups — historical deployment artifacts.
udooz activity is very recent on both personal and org.
Auth token has full 'repo' + 'read:org' + 'workflow' — sufficient for inventory, private repo creation, and Actions.
recommended_next: Create BonAcqui-LLC/cognitive-basin-platform (private) as the dedicated implementation repo per bootstrap directive. Use existing BonAcqui-LLC/cntm-natural-math-canonical-library + fractalish for library/research surface. Separate concerns as specified.
